# Type

**Data field**

A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.

## Overview

Set to `'sgpd'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this sample group description atom.
- **Version**: A 1-byte specification of the version of this sample group description.
- **Flags**: A 3-byte reserved space.
- **Grouping type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the grouping type of this sample group description.
- **Default length**: A 32-bit integer indicating the length of the group entry in the payload data.
- **Entry count**: A 32-bit integer giving the number of entries in the payload data field.
- **Payload data**: A 16-bit signed integer giving the roll distance.
